utterances.speaker: Joanna
utterances.text: The only person that should feel awkward is you , and you did not tell him not to call me , did you ?

emotion_cause.span: 1_you did not tell him not to call me , did you ?

utterances.speaker: Joanna
utterances.text: Because if you feel uncomfortable with your friend dating someone you work for , there are always ways to fix ... that .

emotion_cause.span: 2_there are always ways to fix ... that .
